allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File C:\\Users\\shehr\\Documents\\stadium -Exclude node_modules | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch 'node_modules|\\.next' } | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 20 LastWriteTime, FullName)

PowerShell($f = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\projects\\C--Users-shehr-Documents-stadium\\47d4e19b-65e7-48c3-aa29-1cccbb0ff1b4.jsonl"; $lines = Get-Content $f -Tail 30; foreach \($l in $lines\) { try { $o = $l | ConvertFrom-Json } catch { continue }; if \($o.type -eq 'assistant'\) { foreach \($c in $o.message.content\) { if \($c.type -eq 'text'\) { Write-Output "--- ASSISTANT ---"; Write-Output $c.text } } } elseif \($o.type -eq 'user'\) { if \($o.message.content -is [string]\) { Write-Output "--- USER ---"; Write-Output $o.message.content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(500, $o.message.content.Length\)\) } } })

PowerShell($f = "C:\\Users\\shehr\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\C--Users-shehr-Documents-stadium\\5b0b105b-8380-4b7b-b3d4-f9752a698b1e\\tasks\\brnne669g.output"; $deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(45\); while \(\(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline\) { if \(Test-Path $f\) { $c = Get-Content $f -Raw; if \($c -match "Ready in|Local:|error|EADDRINUSE"\) { break } }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800 }; Get-Content $f -Raw)

PowerShell($ws = New-Object -ComObject WScript.Shell; foreach \($p in @\("C:\\Users\\shehr\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\Stadium dev server.lnk", "C:\\Users\\shehr\\AppData\\Roaming\\Microsoft\\Windows\\Start Menu\\Programs\\Startup\\Stadium dev server.lnk"\)\) { $s = $ws.CreateShortcut\($p\); "$p`n  -> $\($s.TargetPath\) $\($s.Arguments\) [style $\($s.WindowStyle\)]" }; $listen = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -eq 3000 }; if \($listen\) { "SERVER: still up on 3000" } else { "SERVER: down" })

PowerShell(npx eslint app/components/Infrastructure.tsx app/layout.tsx; if \($?\) { "LINT OK" }; $l = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -eq 3000 }; if \($l\) { "SERVER UP \(PID $\($l[0].OwningProcess\)\)" } else { "SERVER DOWN" })

description: Impeccable design detector: runs after Edit/Write/MultiEdit on UI files and surfaces findings as system reminders.
